data.name: Auth.AccountLocked
data.value: Account temporarily locked due to repeated failed attempts.

data.name: Validation.Username.Format
data.value: Username may contain letters, digits, and . _ -

data.name: Guest.TooManyEntries
data.value: Too many entries in guest data.

data.name: Guest.LimitsExceeded
data.value: A saved game exceeded allowed limits.

data.name: Guest.InvalidSaveData
data.value: A saved game had invalid options or moves.

data.name: Guest.IllegalMove
data.value: A saved game contained an illegal move.

data.name: Account.ConfirmMismatch
data.value: Type your username exactly to confirm deletion.

data.name: Submit.Duplicate
data.value: This game has already been submitted.

data.name: Identity.InvalidUserName
data.value: Username '{0}' is invalid: only letters and digits are allowed.

data.name: Identity.PasswordTooShort
data.value: Passwords must be at least {0} characters.

data.name: Identity.PasswordRequiresNonAlphanumeric
data.value: Passwords must contain at least one non-alphanumeric character.

data.name: Identity.PasswordRequiresDigit
data.value: Passwords must contain at least one digit (0–9).

data.name: Identity.PasswordRequiresLower
data.value: Passwords must contain at least one lowercase letter (a–z).

data.name: Identity.PasswordRequiresUpper
data.value: Passwords must contain at least one uppercase letter (A–Z).
